role: Armed Forces Representative to Basij (d. 19 March 2026)
bio: Afshin Naghshbandi served as the Armed Forces Representative to the [Basij Forces](/orgs/basij), a liaison role linking the regular armed forces to the IRGC paramilitary. He was killed on 19 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: Armed Forces Representative to Basij Killed

editorial_notes: Killed 19 March 2026. Armed Forces Representative to Basij.
